title: terminal-use-mcp config.json
description:
Configuration file for terminal-use-mcp MCP server.

Location (auto-discovered, create manually):
  Linux:   ~/.config/terminal-use-mcp/config.json
  macOS:   ~/Library/Application Support/terminal-use-mcp/config.json
  Windows: %APPDATA%/terminal-use-mcp/config.json

Override location with TERMINAL_USE_CONFIG_DIR or TERMINAL_USE_CONFIG_FILE env vars.

Priority: environment variables > config.json > code defaults.
All fields are optional — only include what you want to override.
String values support ${ENV_VAR} placeholders (e.g., "${HOME}/dev").
Path values support ~ expansion (e.g., "~/projects/my-app").

version.description: Config format version (for future migration). Currently 1.

LocalConfig.description: Local provider configuration — overrides environment variable defaults.

workspaceRoot.description: Workspace root directory (env: TERMINAL_USE_WORKSPACE_ROOT). Supports ~ and ${ENV_VAR}.

allowedCwdRoots.description: Additional allowed CWD paths (env: TERMINAL_USE_ALLOWED_CWD, CSV).

cwdPolicyMode.description: CWD policy: 'guarded' (default, allow non-dangerous dirs) or 'strict' (whitelist only). Env: TERMINAL_USE_CWD_POLICY_MODE.

allowedCommands.description: Commands allowed despite built-in deny list (env: TERMINAL_USE_ALLOW_COMMANDS, CSV).

deniedCommands.description: Additional denied commands beyond built-in list (env: TERMINAL_USE_DENY_COMMANDS, CSV).

riskyCommandMode.description: How to handle denied commands: 'deny' (default), 'ask' (prompt), 'allow' (permit). Env: TERMINAL_USE_RISKY_COMMAND_MODE.

sessionTtlMs.description: Session auto-cleanup timeout in ms (env: TERMINAL_USE_SESSION_TTL_MS). Default: 3600000 (1 hour).

cleanupIntervalMs.description: How often to check for expired sessions in ms (env: TERMINAL_USE_CLEANUP_INTERVAL_MS). Default: 60000 (1 min).

artifactDir.description: Artifact/transcript output directory (env: TERMINAL_USE_ARTIFACT_DIR). Supports ~ and ${ENV_VAR}.

providers.description: Enabled provider whitelist (env: TERMINAL_USE_PROVIDERS, CSV). Unset = all enabled.

capabilityPreset.description: Capability preset controlling provider/tool combo (env: TERMINAL_USE_CAPABILITY_PRESET). Default: 'local'.

toolProfile.description: Tool profile controlling registered tools (env: TERMINAL_USE_TOOL_PROFILE). Default: 'auto'.

tools.description: Explicitly enabled tools (only in 'custom' profile mode). Env: TERMINAL_USE_TOOLS, CSV.

extraTools.description: Extra tools to add on top of profile (env: TERMINAL_USE_EXTRA_TOOLS, CSV).

disabledTools.description: Tools to remove from profile (env: TERMINAL_USE_DISABLED_TOOLS, CSV).

sshAgentDiscoveryMode.description: SSH agent socket discovery mode (env: TERMINAL_USE_SSH_AGENT_DISCOVERY). Default: 'xdg'.

secretEnvPolicy.description: Secret env var handling policy (env: TERMINAL_USE_SECRET_ENV_POLICY). Default: 'deny'.

sessionIdMatchMode.description: Session ID matching mode (env: TERMINAL_USE_SESSION_ID_MATCH). Default: 'lenient'.

auditLogEnabled.description: Enable audit log (env: TERMINAL_USE_AUDIT_LOG, '1'/'0'). Default: true.

defaultWaitForTextTimeoutMs.description: Default timeout for wait_for_text in ms (env: TERMINAL_USE_DEFAULT_WAIT_FOR_TEXT_TIMEOUT_MS). AI can override via timeoutMs param. Default: 10000.

defaultWaitStableTimeoutMs.description: Default timeout for wait_stable in ms (env: TERMINAL_USE_DEFAULT_WAIT_STABLE_TIMEOUT_MS). AI can override via timeoutMs param. Default: 5000.

defaultWaitStableIdleMs.description: Default idle window for wait_stable in ms (env: TERMINAL_USE_DEFAULT_WAIT_STABLE_IDLE_MS). AI can override via idleMs param. Default: 500.

SshDefaults.description: SSH global defaults shared across all profiles.

allowTmux.description: Allow ssh-tmux provider by default. Default: true.

connectTimeoutMs.description: SSH connection timeout in ms. Default: 10000.

keepaliveIntervalMs.description: SSH keepalive interval in ms. Default: 15000.

agentDiscoveryMode.description: SSH agent socket discovery mode. Default: 'xdg'.

SshProfileOverlay.description: SSH profile overlay — only write terminal-use-mcp extensions. Place in profiles/<name>.json. When sshConfigHost is set, SSH connection params are read from ~/.ssh/config.

sshConfigHost.description: OpenSSH ~/.ssh/config Host alias. When set, connection params (host/port/user/identity) are resolved from SSH config.

knownHosts.description: Path to known_hosts file for host key verification.

defaultCwd.description: Default remote working directory for this profile.

remoteAllowedCwd.description: Remote allowed CWD paths for this profile.

remoteDeniedCwd.description: Remote denied CWD paths for this profile.

allowTmux.description: Allow ssh-tmux provider for this profile.

connectTimeoutMs.description: SSH connection timeout in ms for this profile.

keepaliveIntervalMs.description: SSH keepalive interval in ms for this profile.

socket.description: Explicit ssh-agent socket path (optional, auto-discovered by default).

oneOf.description: Use a key file for authentication. Password auth is prohibited.

path.description: Path to the private key file. Supports ~ expansion.

passphraseEnv.description: Environment variable name holding the passphrase (NOT the passphrase itself).
